# CWE-1051 vulnerable: hard-coded upstream API host
lang: go
file: CWE-1051-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1051: Initialization with Hard-Coded Network Resource Configuration Data.
// Vulnerable: billing client always dials fixed private IP 10.20.30.40.

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const billingAPI = "http://10.20.30.40:9090/v1/charge"

func ChargeCard() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		cardToken := c.PostForm("card_token")
		req, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, billingAPI, nil)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		req.Header.Set("X-Card-Token", cardToken)
		resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		defer resp.Body.Close()
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": resp.Status})
	}
}
